title: Full Texture Revamp: Bryant Quest Visuals
description: Reimagine what Minecraft can be with BQV! See great changes and some creative new changes. See realistic changes and thankful changes to make the game more impactful. Survival, Pvp, and Creative friendly.
body:
![Bryant Quest Visuals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b1264db1dc4499d441da43a800d7692ac544be4.png)

Official Java Port - FREE TO USE IN MODPACKS

Complete world retexture pack, more items and blocks and mobs and UI coming soon!!! Better than vanilla, looks great with shaders and animation mods!

26.2 Coming Soon!

![Diamond Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a8873f020df0cfb806618813a9ba4df69d6e193.png) New Pickaxes!

![Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/532206fb438dab076c996b26a992c7666f17ad38_0.webp)![Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/532206fb438dab076c996b26a992c7666f17ad38_0.webp)![Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/532206fb438dab076c996b26a992c7666f17ad38_0.webp)![Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/532206fb438dab076c996b26a992c7666f17ad38_0.webp)![Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/532206fb438dab076c996b26a992c7666f17ad38_0.webp)![Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/532206fb438dab076c996b26a992c7666f17ad38_0.webp)![Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/532206fb438dab076c996b26a992c7666f17ad38_0.webp)![Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/532206fb438dab076c996b26a992c7666f17ad38_0.webp)![Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/532206fb438dab076c996b26a992c7666f17ad38_0.webp)![Half Heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a83ef2159b4b8d1430815a65e7ba790791c12515_0.webp) New Hearts!

Please follow the pack if you enjoy it, or add it to collections or modpacks!
You will be highly appreciated!
Some features will be requiring EMF & ETF or OptiFine! The pack will still work without them though!

Coming Soon:

More Mobs And Entities Textured
More Blocks And Items Textured
More UI Texture Changes!

Made by Bryant Reitzel!

![Bryant Quest Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e7847a41b2ec9faafc1936aaa045549943d5897.png)
